sql_array: CREATE TABLE trades (id Int32, crypto_name String, trade_price Float64);
INSERT INTO trades (id, crypto_name, trade_price) VALUES (1, 'Bitcoin', 200.5), (2, 'Ethereum', 150.0), (3, 'Litecoin', 50.0);
CREATE TABLE holdings (id Int32, crypto_name String, amount Float64);
INSERT INTO holdings (id, crypto_name, amount) VALUES (1, 'Bitcoin', 2), (2, 'Ethereum', 5), (3, 'Dogecoin', 100);
SELECT crypto_name FROM trades WHERE trade_price > 100 INTERSECT SELECT crypto_name FROM holdings;
